rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Nos. 1-5, 9, 13-16, And 20, And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 29, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Defendant Chester C. Lehman Co., Inc. dba Electrical Distributors Co.¿s motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents nos. 1-5, 9, 13-16 and 20 is granted. If , as appears to be the case, plaintiffs do not have any responsive documents, they should so state in verified responses. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $1690 (6 hours at $275 per hour plus costs of $40). Plaintiffs¿ refusal to provide further verified responses lacks substantial justification. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CORNELIUS MURPHY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Fdcc California, Inc. Formerly Known As Dinwiddie Construction Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(S) Most Qualified For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 29, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel FDCC California Inc. to produce its custodian of records and persons most qualified for deposition and to produce documents is continued to April 26 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
